params.name: client_id
params.description: Issued when you created your application.

params.name: client_secret
params.description: Issued when you created your application.

params.name: code
params.description: The `code` param returned via the OAuth callback.

params.name: redirect_uri
params.description: This must match the originally submitted URI (if one was sent).

params.name: single_channel
params.description: Request the user to add your app only to a single channel. Only valid with a [legacy workspace app](https://api.slack.com/legacy-workspace-apps).

items.docs: Exchanges a temporary OAuth verifier code for an access token.
